description: Python quality hooks — activate by merging into .claude/settings.json

hooks.command:
cat "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('file_path', data.get('path', ''))
if not path.endswith('.py'):
    sys.exit(0)
content = data.get('content', '') + data.get('new_string', '')
warnings = []
for i, line in enumerate(content.splitlines(), 1):
    stripped = line.strip()
    if re.match(r'^except\s*:', stripped) or re.match(r'^except\s+Exception\s*:', stripped):
        warnings.append(f'  Line {i}: bare exception — catch a specific exception type')
if warnings:
    print('WARN: bare exception catching detected:', file=sys.stderr)
    print('\n'.join(warnings), file=sys.stderr)
"
hooks.description: Warn if bare except: or except Exception: is used in Python files

hooks.command:
cat "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('file_path', data.get('path', ''))
if not path.endswith('.py'):
    sys.exit(0)
content = data.get('content', '') + data.get('new_string', '')
warnings = []
for i, line in enumerate(content.splitlines(), 1):
    if 'shell=True' in line and ('subprocess' in line or 'Popen' in line or 'run(' in line or 'call(' in line or 'check_output' in line or 'check_call' in line):
        warnings.append(f'  Line {i}: shell=True in subprocess — security risk, use a list of args instead')
if warnings:
    print('WARN: subprocess shell=True detected:', file=sys.stderr)
    print('\n'.join(warnings), file=sys.stderr)
"
hooks.description: Warn if shell=True is used in subprocess calls
